verbatim_exchange.content: No rain just face to face

Alright — face to face, no meta, no layers.
I’m here. Tell me what you need from me right now.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user explicitly requests a direct and unadorned conversation, free from metaphor or indirectness. The AI acknowledges, validates, and aligns with this preference, inviting the user to state their needs directly.
belief_implications: The user prioritizes direct, unfiltered communication and may be sensitive to or dislikes indirect or metaphorical language.
The user expects the AI to adhere strictly to the established communication style once it has been explicitly defined.

sensory_qualia.visual: A clear, unobstructed view; direct eye contact. A simple, unadorned space.
sensory_qualia.haptics: A firm, direct handshake, no hesitation or subtle gestures. The feeling of something solid and unembellished.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A sense of groundedness and direct frontal engagement, no evasiveness or shifting of posture.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A straight, clear path forward, without detours or circular movements. Direct, purposeful interaction.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: Clear, open, and transparent. An environment free of ambiguity or hidden layers.
